title: Flea Treatment in Ridgewood, Queens | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Ridgewood, Queens. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Ridgewood home? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast and effective flea treatment services throughout Ridgewood, Queens. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: We've been serving Ridgewood residents for years with same-day and next-day service options. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in Queens' diverse housing stock, from pre-war apartments to single-family homes, and we guarantee results with our follow-up treatments included.
localContext: Ridgewood's charming mix of historic Mathews Model Flats, rowhouses, and multi-family buildings along Forest Avenue and Fresh Pond Road can all be vulnerable to flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly buildings. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood's architecture and provides discreet, effective service to homes near Grover Cleveland Park and throughout the Ridgewood Historic District.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Ridgewood, Queens?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Ridgewood range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home and the severity of the infestation. This includes an initial treatment and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we need to break the flea life cycle. We include a follow-up treatment 10-14 days after the initial service to target newly hatched fleas and ensure your home is completely flea-free.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Ridgewood apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all people and pets vacate the premises for 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment. You'll need to remove or cover food items, and we'll provide detailed preparation instructions. Fish tanks should be covered and air pumps turned off. You can safely return once the treated areas have dried completely.

faqs.question: Will one flea treatment be enough for my home?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations require at least two treatments for complete elimination due to the flea life cycle. Our service includes an initial treatment and a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to target any newly emerged fleas. For severe infestations, a third treatment may be necessary, which we'll discuss during your initial inspection.
